name: Friendship Cake- 30 Day Cake
recipeIngredient: Fruit juice from the maraschino cherries (1 1/2 cups each for two cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups of the fruit juice with the yellow cake mix, vanilla pudding mix, oil, and eggs.
2. Mix in the diced maraschino cherries until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased bundt pan.
4. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 1 hour.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
6. Serve plain or with a drizzle of rum (about 1-1 1/2 oz) for added flavor.
Note: Do not refrigerate the cake batter and avoid using metal utensils. Store any leftover batter in an airtight container.
